title: Fermented Creamy Solo-Dinner Polish Ackee Stir-fry
description: A high-protein-friendly solo-dinner dish featuring ackee stir-fried with fermented cream and other high-protein ingredients.

ingredients.name: 1 cup of fermented cashew cream
ingredients.notes: ensure the source is safe and certified for consumption

ingredients.name: 1 medium tomato, chopped
ingredients.notes: fresh or roasted can be used

ingredients.name: 1 small cucumber, diced
ingredients.notes: use fresh or frozen if needed

ingredients.name: 4-5 pcs of ackee fruit, peeled and quartered
ingredients.notes: ensure the source is from a safe region as ackee can be toxic in other places

ingredients.name: A pinch of sea salt and black pepper to taste

instructions: Place the fermented cashew cream in a blender or food processor and blend until smooth.
In a wok or large frying pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and cook for about 30 seconds.
Add diced tomatoes and cucumber to the wok, tossing them around to coat with garlic oil.
Pour in the blended fermented cashew cream into the wok, stirring continuously until it coats all vegetables.
Fold in quartered ackee fruit. Cook for about 2-3 minutes, allowing the ackee to warm up and slightly cook.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed with sea salt and black pepper.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
